label: Normal winter day
description: All feeders energized through a full day. No outage. Shows the diurnal demand pattern and how it tracks outdoor temperature.

label: Outage + naive close-all
description: 3-hour substation outage, then every feeder closed simultaneously. Cold-load pickup exceeds the per-feeder trip threshold; the urban feeders trip immediately.

label: Outage + smart restoration
description: 3-hour substation outage, then feeders closed rural-first with a 12-minute settle window between each. CLPU is sequenced; no trips.

label: Cold snap day
description: Synthetic deep-cold day (~-15 degC). Steady-state demand is much higher; the CLPU headroom shrinks because per-house duty is near 1.
